headline: Is Kimco’s Necessity-Based Leasing Momentum Altering The Investment Case For Kimco Realty (KIM)?
summary: In recent days, Kimco Realty highlighted resilient demand for its necessity-based, grocery-anchored shopping centers, citing strong leasing, record occupancy, and a sizable signed-but-not-open pipeline expected to support future rent gains within the retail REIT sector. At the same time, investors are watching closely ahead of Kimco’s upcoming first-quarter earnings release on April 30, 2026, where analysts anticipate continued FFO growth following several quarters of better-than-expected...
